title: January 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption:
January's Kitchen bringing back those Oxford Street exclusive vibes and spa store memories! 🌟📦💭 
Eye Mask: Striking blue and soft 100% cotton mask 👁️👁️
Butterball Body Lotion: Still the thickest, dreamiest texture - vanilla comfort in a pot 🧈☁️ 
Sleepy Shower Gummy: From the Shaun the Sheep collab era, malty lavender magic continues 🐑💜
Forty Winks Massage Bar: Temple balm heritage meets massage bar luxury 💆‍♀️✨ 
Lavender Vida Loca Soap: Chamomile and lavender tradition for bedtime rituals 🌙💜 
Softy Foot Lotion: Marshmallow root softness for those feet 🦶
Dream Time Naked Bath Oil: Temple balm roots transformed into bath oil luxury 🛁
Golden Slumbers Bath Bomb: Accessible beyond Oxford Street - golden waters for all! ⭐💛

nostalgiaNotes.title: Eye mask
nostalgiaNotes.body: Part of Lush's beloved Sleepy range, a fan-favourite sleep-aid collection that has built a devoted following since its launch

nostalgiaNotes.title: Eye mask
nostalgiaNotes.body: The Sleepy eye mask is a Kitchen and exclusive product designed as part of the broader Sleepy sleep range

nostalgiaNotes.title: Eye mask
nostalgiaNotes.body: Companion product to the iconic Sleepy body lotion and Twilight bath bomb, extending the lavender-tonka sleep ritual

nostalgiaNotes.title: Butterball
nostalgiaNotes.body: Butterball is one of Lush's most enduring and beloved bath bombs, a staple since the early days and a perennial fan favourite for its simple, skin-loving luxury

nostalgiaNotes.title: Butterball
nostalgiaNotes.body: One of Lush's longest-running products, Butterball has been a mainstay on the main line for decades before appearing as Kitchen iterations

nostalgiaNotes.title: Butterball
nostalgiaNotes.body: The original Butterball bath bomb, a Lush classic known for its cocoa butter and almond oil skin-softening properties

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sleepy
nostalgiaNotes.body: The Sleepy range took the Lush world by storm and became a cult phenomenon, with fans swearing by its sleep-inducing lavender and tonka scent — this shower gummy brings that magic into the bathroom routine

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sleepy
nostalgiaNotes.body: The Sleepy scent family launched as a body lotion and expanded into a full range of products; shower gummy formats are a newer Kitchen innovation

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sleepy
nostalgiaNotes.body: A shower gummy interpretation of the iconic Sleepy body lotion, carrying the same malty lavender and tonka bean scent

nostalgiaNotes.title: Forty Winks
nostalgiaNotes.body: Forty Winks has long been a cherished product in Lush's sleep and relaxation repertoire, beloved by fans who use it as part of a bedtime massage ritual

nostalgiaNotes.title: Forty Winks
nostalgiaNotes.body: Forty Winks massage bar has appeared in various formats across Lush's main line and Kitchen over the years, consistently featuring lavender and rosemary as hero notes

nostalgiaNotes.title: Forty Winks
nostalgiaNotes.body: Part of Lush's sleep-focused product family alongside Sleepy and Dream Time, sharing the lavender-led relaxation theme

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lavender Vida Loca
nostalgiaNotes.body: A playful nod to Lush's Vida Loca naming tradition, beloved by fans who enjoy Lush's whimsical product names paired with genuinely calming formulas

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lavender Vida Loca
nostalgiaNotes.body: Lavender Vida Loca is a Kitchen-exclusive soap that fits into the January 2026 sleep-themed box, featuring lavender and chamomile as key botanicals

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lavender Vida Loca
nostalgiaNotes.body: Shares its calming lavender and chamomile spirit with the broader Lush sleep range, acting as a cleansing companion to products like Sleepy and Forty Winks

nostalgiaNotes.title: Softy
nostalgiaNotes.body: Softy foot lotion is a Kitchen gem that fans of Lush's indulgent body care line adore for its gentle, comforting formula perfect for tired feet

nostalgiaNotes.title: Softy
nostalgiaNotes.body: Softy has appeared as a Kitchen exclusive foot lotion, celebrated for its marshmallow root and rich butter blend aimed at intense foot softening

nostalgiaNotes.title: Softy
nostalgiaNotes.body: Evokes the same cosy, marshmallow-soft comfort as products like Sleepy, making it a natural bedtime foot-care companion

nostalgiaNotes.title: Dream Time
nostalgiaNotes.body: Naked bath oils are a fan-favourite Kitchen format, and Dream Time resonates deeply with those who love Lush's sleep-focused range and the ritual of a calming evening bath

nostalgiaNotes.title: Dream Time
nostalgiaNotes.body: Dream Time naked bath oil is a Kitchen exclusive that fits within Lush's growing sleep and relaxation product family, using a naked/solid format to reduce packaging

nostalgiaNotes.title: Dream Time
nostalgiaNotes.body: A solid bath oil companion to the Sleepy and Twilight range, channelling the same calming, sleep-inducing botanical oils in a luxurious cocoa butter base

nostalgiaNotes.title: Golden slumbers
nostalgiaNotes.body: The name is a nod to the beloved Beatles song, instantly evoking warmth and nostalgia — fans of Lush's sleep range adore this bath bomb for combining glittering, golden visuals with genuinely calming botanicals

nostalgiaNotes.title: Golden slumbers
nostalgiaNotes.body: Golden Slumbers bath bomb has appeared as a Kitchen and seasonal exclusive, celebrated for its golden glittering waters and sleep-focused botanical blend of chamomile, lavender, and neroli

nostalgiaNotes.title: Golden slumbers
nostalgiaNotes.body: Shares its lavender and chamomile sleep-inducing DNA with the wider Lush sleep range, with neroli adding a brightening, clarifying twist reminiscent of products like Twilight

products.name: Eye mask
products.description: A soothing eye mask infused with the calming, dreamy scent of the beloved Sleepy range — lavender and tonka bean — designed to help you drift off into a restful slumber.
products.nostalgiaNote: Part of Lush's beloved Sleepy range, a fan-favourite sleep-aid collection that has built a devoted following since its launch

products.name: Butterball
products.description: BODY LOTION: Get soft and snuggly with this dreamy cream of moisturising cocoa butter and almond oil, with a comforting vanilla — like fragrance.
products.nostalgiaNote: Butterball is one of Lush's most enduring and beloved bath bombs, a staple since the early days and a perennial fan favourite for its simple, skin-loving luxury

products.name: Sleepy
products.description: SHOWER GUMMY: When twilight settles in, wash the day away with sweet and comforting malty lavender suds.
products.nostalgiaNote: The Sleepy range took the Lush world by storm and became a cult phenomenon, with fans swearing by its sleep-inducing lavender and tonka scent — this shower gummy brings that magic into the bathroom routine

products.name: Forty Winks
products.description: MASSAGE BAR: Lavender and rosemary clear the fog while tarragon banishes apathy, so after a good massage you should feel just about ready to tackle anything! LAVENDER VIDA LOCA Soap Flourishes of lavender and sweet chamomile help soothe your skin and clear your mind so you can sink into a peaceful slumber.
products.nostalgiaNote: Forty Winks has long been a cherished product in Lush's sleep and relaxation repertoire, beloved by fans who use it as part of a bedtime massage ritual

products.name: Lavender Vida Loca
products.description: Soap: flourishes of lavender and sweet chamomile help sooth your skin and clear your mind so you can sink into a peaceful slumber.
products.nostalgiaNote: A playful nod to Lush's Vida Loca naming tradition, beloved by fans who enjoy Lush's whimsical product names paired with genuinely calming formulas

products.name: Softy
products.description: FOOT LOTION: Kick back and relax as a dreamy blend of rich butters and marshmallow root soften your soles.
products.nostalgiaNote: Softy foot lotion is a Kitchen gem that fans of Lush's indulgent body care line adore for its gentle, comforting formula perfect for tired feet

products.name: Dream Time
products.description: NAKED BATH OIL: A small but mighty brick of luxurious cocoa butter to moisturise your skin and all the most calming oils we could think of.
products.nostalgiaNote: Naked bath oils are a fan-favourite Kitchen format, and Dream Time resonates deeply with those who love Lush's sleep-focused range and the ritual of a calming evening bath

products.name: Golden slumbers
products.description: BATH BOMB: Soak in glittering golden waters of calming chamomile and lavender, while a clearing shot of neroli cuts through your thoughts.
products.nostalgiaNote: The name is a nod to the beloved Beatles song, instantly evoking warmth and nostalgia — fans of Lush's sleep range adore this bath bomb for combining glittering, golden visuals with genuinely calming botanicals
